subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! It is dawn, and the musk-laden fragrance from the gardens of the Most Exalted is diffused, and the lights of sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و میثاق صبح است و بوی مشکین از ریاض علیین منتشر و انوار تقدیس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
